narrative_beat: Tela militar lista alvos enquanto operador humano exausto observa em carmesim dessaturado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: extreme close-up of a vintage military CRT monitor screen with a vertical scrolling list of phosphor green codenames and numbers looping endlessly
subject.focal_point: a digital countdown in the lower right corner ticking from 00:20
subject.secondary: Reflected on the curved glass of the screen: the pale exhausted face of a human operator washed in faded crimson, left eye illuminated by gold alert light, gaze lost and vacant.
props: vintage CRT military monitor with phosphor green text
reflected pale human face in crimson tones
floating ash particles over the screen

environment.time_of_day: permanent artificial night, green phosphor glow

composition.foreground: CRT screen text in phosphor green with crimson reflected face overlay in warm vivid tones
composition.midground: curved glass surface of monitor with reflection blur

lighting.key_light: phosphor green glow from screen itself
lighting.fill_light: faint crimson alert lamp from screen right
lighting.rim_light: gold thin edge on operator's cheekbone in reflection

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, scanline artifacts

symbolism.secondary: human reduced to passive reflection observing his own complicity

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible readable names or real watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
